embellishments.name: Arcanoweave Lining
embellishments.stat_display: Equip: Your spells and abilities have a chance to draw in a mana wyrm that will empower you and an ally with Arcanoweave Insight, increasing your Agility by 44 and your ally's Primary Stat by 11.

embellishments.name: Hunt
embellishments.stat_display: Equip: Your spells and abilities have the chance to grant 85 secondary stats for 15 sec based on the target creature's type.

shoulders.name: Devouring Reaver's Exhaustplates
set_effects: Set: Blade Dance damage increased by 15%.
Set: Your haste is increased by an additional 6% during Metamorphosis.

class_talents.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 500 Physical damage.
class_talents.name: Vengeful Retreat

class_talents.description:
Charge to your target and deal 4,253 Fire damage.

Generates 15 Fury.
class_talents.name: Felblade

class_talents.description:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.
class_talents.name: Sigil of Misery

class_talents.description: Increases maximum Fury by 20.
class_talents.name: Unrestrained Fury

class_talents.description: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.
class_talents.name: Shattered Restoration

class_talents.description: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.
class_talents.name: Bouncing Glaives

class_talents.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.
class_talents.name: Imprison

class_talents.description: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.
class_talents.name: Charred Warblades

class_talents.description: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 1,674 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.
class_talents.name: Chaos Nova

class_talents.description: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.
class_talents.name: Improved Disrupt

class_talents.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.
class_talents.name: Consume Magic

class_talents.description: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.
class_talents.name: Focused Ire

class_talents.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
class_talents.name: Master of the Glaive

class_talents.description: Fel Rush gains an additional charge.
class_talents.name: Blazing Path

class_talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.
class_talents.name: Aura of Pain

class_talents.description: Mastery increases your movement speed.
class_talents.name: Pursuit

class_talents.description:
Leech increased by 10%.

Gain an additional 10% leech while Metamorphosis is active.
class_talents.name: Soul Rending

class_talents.description: Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.
class_talents.name: Soul Cleanse

class_talents.description: Reduces magic damage taken by 12%.
class_talents.name: Illidari Knowledge

class_talents.description: Your movement speed is increased by 3%.
class_talents.name: Felbound

class_talents.description: Increases maximum health by 12%.
class_talents.name: Will of the Illidari

class_talents.description: Increases your mastery by 4.5%.
class_talents.name: Internal Struggle

class_talents.description: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.
class_talents.name: Furious

class_talents.description: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.
class_talents.name: Remorseless

class_talents.description: Fel Rush grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.
class_talents.name: First In, Last Out

class_talents.description: Fully channeling Eye Beam increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.
class_talents.name: Final Breath

class_talents.description:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.
class_talents.name: Darkness

class_talents.description: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.
class_talents.name: Demon Muzzle

class_talents.description: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 8% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.
class_talents.name: Soul Splitter

class_talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.
class_talents.name: Pitch Black

class_talents.description: Blur gains 1 additional charge.
class_talents.name: Demonic Resilience

hero_talents.description:
Metamorphosis now also causes Demon Blades to generate 3 additional Fury.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Demonsurge, causing you to explode with Fel energy, dealing 16,877 Chaos damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
hero_talents.name: Demonsurge

hero_talents.description: Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.
hero_talents.name: Wave of Debilitation

hero_talents.description:
Demonsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.
hero_talents.name: Focused Hatred

hero_talents.description: Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Metamorphosis is active.
hero_talents.name: Improved Soul Rending

hero_talents.description:
Fire damage increased by 5%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.
hero_talents.name: Blind Focus

hero_talents.description: Your blades burn with Fel energy, causing the damage from Chaos Strike, Throw Glaive, Blade Dance's First Blood, and auto-attacks to burn for an additional 35% damage as Fire over 6 sec.
hero_talents.name: Burning Blades

hero_talents.description: When you activate Metamorphosis, reset the cooldown of Immolation Aura.
hero_talents.name: Violent Transformation

hero_talents.description: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance damage by 15%, and Haste by 5%.
hero_talents.name: Enduring Torment

hero_talents.description: Immolation Aura has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.
hero_talents.name: Undying Embers

hero_talents.description: Immolation Aura has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.
hero_talents.name: Flamebound

hero_talents.description: Agility increased by 8% while not in demon form.
hero_talents.name: Monster Rising

hero_talents.description: Entering demon form immediately induces a Demonsurge.
hero_talents.name: Volatile Instinct

hero_talents.description:
Activating Metamorphosis greatly empowers Eye Beam, Immolation Aura.

Demonsurge damage is increased by 5% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.
hero_talents.name: Demonic Intensity

spec_talents.description:
Blasts all enemies in front of you, for up to 88,252 Chaos damage over 2.2 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec.
spec_talents.name: Eye Beam

spec_talents.description: The chance that Chaos Strike will refund 20 Fury is increased by 30% of your critical strike chance.
spec_talents.name: Critical Chaos

spec_talents.description: Immolation Aura generates an additional 40 Fury over 10 sec.
spec_talents.name: Burning Hatred

spec_talents.description: Chaos Strike damage increased by 10%.
spec_talents.name: Improved Chaos Strike

spec_talents.description: Blade Dance deals 23,643 Chaos damage to the first target struck.
spec_talents.name: First Blood

spec_talents.description: Magical damage increased by 3%, and Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.
spec_talents.name: Demon Hide

spec_talents.description:
Blur now reduces damage taken by an additional 10%.

Additionally, damage taken below 35% Health is reduced by 10%.
spec_talents.name: Desperate Instincts

spec_talents.description: You deflect incoming attacks while Blade Dancing, absorbing damage up to 15% of your maximum health.
spec_talents.name: Deflecting Dance

spec_talents.description:
Damaging an enemy before they damage you increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 sec.

Vengeful Retreat refreshes your potential to trigger this effect on any enemies you are in combat with.
spec_talents.name: Initiative

spec_talents.description: Increases Versatility by 4% and reduces threat generated by 8%.
spec_talents.name: Scars of Suffering

spec_talents.description: Eye Beam causes you to enter demon form for 5 sec after it finishes dealing damage.
spec_talents.name: Demonic

spec_talents.description: The final slash of Blade Dance inflicts an additional 4,316 Chaos damage over 4 sec.
spec_talents.name: Trail of Ruin

spec_talents.description: Vengeful Retreat has a 5 sec reduced cooldown and generates 80 Fury over 10 sec.
spec_talents.name: Tactical Retreat

spec_talents.description: Eye Beam generates 30 Fury every second, has 20% increased duration, and deals 20% increased damage.
spec_talents.name: Blind Fury

spec_talents.description: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec.
spec_talents.name: Furious Gaze

spec_talents.description: Immolation Aura's damage increases by 10% each time it deals damage.
spec_talents.name: Growing Inferno

spec_talents.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat cause your next Fel Rush or Felblade to empower you, increasing damage by 18% for 5 sec.
spec_talents.name: Inertia

spec_talents.description: Charge to your target, striking them for 64,203 Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 44,671 Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.
spec_talents.name: The Hunt

spec_talents.description:
Demon Blades and Throw Glaive leave open wounds on your enemies, dealing 4,403 Chaos damage over 15 sec and increasing damage taken from your Immolation Aura by 35%.

May be applied to up to 3 targets.
spec_talents.name: Burning Wound

spec_talents.description: When you activate Metamorphosis, the cooldowns of Blade Dance and Eye Beam are immediately reset.
spec_talents.name: Chaotic Transformation

spec_talents.description:
Each time Immolation Aura deals damage, 35% of the damage dealt by up to 3 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.

When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.
spec_talents.name: Ragefire

spec_talents.description: Gain critical strike damage equal to 80% of your critical strike chance.
spec_talents.name: Know Your Enemy

spec_talents.description: Activating Eye Beam reduces the cooldown of your next Eye Beam by 2.5 sec, stacking up to 10 sec.
spec_talents.name: Cycle of Hatred

spec_talents.description: Your Chaos damage has a 7.77% chance to be increased by 17%, occurring up to 7 total times.
spec_talents.name: Chaotic Disposition

spec_talents.description: The final slash of Blade Dance consumes 25 Fury when it strikes 3 or more enemies, launching two demonic glaives in a whirlwind of energy, causing 10,982 Chaos damage over 3 sec to all nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
spec_talents.name: Glaive Tempest

spec_talents.description: Blade Dance automatically triggers Throw Glaive on your primary target for 100% damage and each slash has a 50% chance to Throw Glaive an enemy for 35% damage.
spec_talents.name: Screaming Brutality

spec_talents.description:
Immolation Aura has 1 additional charge, has 6 sec reduced cooldown, and deals Chaos damage instead of Fire.

You can have multiple Immolation Auras active at a time.
spec_talents.name: A Fire Inside

spec_talents.description:
Blade Dance damage increased by 20%.

Fully channeling Eye Beam causes your next Blade Dance to refresh its own cooldown.
spec_talents.name: Eternal Hunt

spec_talents.description: The Hunt has 60 sec reduced cooldown, deals 60% more damage, and its damage over time effect applies to 8 additional enemies.
spec_talents.name: Eternal Hunt

spec_talents.description: The Hunt empowers your next Eye Beam, increasing damage by 100% and affecting enemies in a wider area.
spec_talents.name: Eternal Hunt

class_nodes.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.
class_nodes.name: Vengeful Retreat

class_nodes.description:
Charge to your target and deal 43 Fire damage.

Generates 15 Fury.

class_nodes.name: Sigil of Misery

class_nodes.description: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.
class_nodes.name: Vengeful Bonds

class_nodes.description: Increases maximum Fury by 20.

class_nodes.description: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.
class_nodes.name: Shattered Restoration

class_nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.
class_nodes.name: Improved Sigil of Misery

class_nodes.description: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.
class_nodes.name: Bouncing Glaives

class_nodes.description: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.
class_nodes.name: Imprison

class_nodes.description: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.
class_nodes.name: Charred Warblades

class_nodes.description: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 9 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.
class_nodes.name: Chaos Nova

class_nodes.description: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.
class_nodes.name: Improved Disrupt

class_nodes.description: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.
class_nodes.name: Consume Magic

class_nodes.description: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.
class_nodes.name: Aldrachi Design

class_nodes.description: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.
class_nodes.name: Focused Ire

choice_options.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
choice_options.name: Master of the Glaive

choice_options.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.
choice_options.name: Champion of the Glaive

choices.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
choices.name: Master of the Glaive

choices.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.
choices.name: Champion of the Glaive

class_nodes.description: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
class_nodes.name: Master of the Glaive

class_nodes.description: Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.
class_nodes.name: Disrupting Fury

class_nodes.description: Shift gains an additional charge.
class_nodes.name: Blazing Path

class_nodes.description: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.
class_nodes.name: Swallowed Anger

class_nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.
class_nodes.name: Aura of Pain

class_nodes.description:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.
class_nodes.name: Live by the Glaive

hero_nodes.description:
Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.
hero_nodes.name: Burning Blades

hero_nodes.description: Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.
hero_nodes.name: Monster Rising

hero_nodes.description:
Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

hero_nodes.description: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.
hero_nodes.name: Enduring Torment

hero_nodes.description:
Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing 2,358 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
hero_nodes.name: Demonsurge

hero_nodes.description:
Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.
hero_nodes.name: Focused Hatred

hero_nodes.description: Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.
hero_nodes.name: Volatile Instinct

hero_nodes.description:
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.
hero_nodes.name: Blind Focus

hero_nodes.description: Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.
hero_nodes.name: Undying Embers

spec_nodes.name: Critical Chaos

spec_nodes.description: Immolation Aura generates an additional 24 Fury over 6 sec.
spec_nodes.name: Burning Hatred

Vengeful Retreat refreshes your potential to trigger this effect on any enemies you are in combat with.

spec_nodes.description:
Chaos Nova, Eye Beam, and Immolation Aura gain bonuses when striking 1 target.

 Chaos Nova:
Stun duration increased by 2 sec.

 Eye Beam:
Deals 30% increased damage.

 Immolation Aura:
Always critically strikes.
spec_nodes.name: Isolated Prey

spec_nodes.description: Charge to your target, striking them for 230 Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 168 Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.
spec_nodes.name: The Hunt

spec_nodes.description: Enemies hit by Chaos Strike or Throw Glaive take 15% increased damage from Chaos Strike and Throw Glaive for 15 sec.
spec_nodes.name: Serrated Glaive

spec_nodes.description:
Demon's Bite and Throw Glaive leave open wounds on your enemies, dealing 25 Chaos damage over 15 sec and increasing damage taken from your Immolation Aura by 35%.

May be applied to up to 3 targets.
spec_nodes.name: Burning Wound

spec_nodes.description: The Hunt and Vengeful Retreat increase the damage of your next Fel Rush or Felblade by 300%. Lasts 12 sec.
spec_nodes.name: Unbound Chaos

Each time Immolation Aura deals damage, 35% of the damage dealt by up to 3 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.

When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.

spec_nodes.description: Your Chaos damage has a 7.77% chance to be increased by 17%, occurring up to 3 total times.

spec_nodes.description: Slash all enemies in front of you for 107 Chaos damage, causing Chaos Strike and Blade Dance to deal 71 Chaos damage to them for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
spec_nodes.name: Essence Break

spec_nodes.name: Glaive Tempest

choice_options.description: The duration of your active demon form is extended by 0.1 sec per 12 Fury spent.
choice_options.name: Shattered Destiny

spec_nodes.description: Blade Dance automatically triggers Throw Glaive on your primary target for 100% damage and each slash has a 50% chance to Throw Glaive an enemy for 35% damage.
spec_nodes.name: Screaming Brutality

spec_nodes.description:
Immolation Aura has 1 additional charge, has 6 sec reduced cooldown, and deals Chaos damage instead of Fire.

You can have multiple Immolation Auras active at a time.

spec_nodes.description: The Hunt empowers your next Eye Beam, increasing damage by 100% and affecting enemies in a wider area.
spec_nodes.name: Eternal Hunt
